highlights.text: I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend until evidence is given otherwise.
Institutions leave their footprint on the chart when they buy a dip and it comes in the form of my core setup: The Failed Breakdown.
Institutions long by waiting for a deep elevator down sell, they wait for price to undercut a low, they then trap shorts, price recovers the low, and we squeeze the other way.
This is the Failed Breakdown, and my edge is simply following them.
Last week, bulls bought every dip via Failed Breakdowns.
I wrote last Tuesday at 4pm: “The Failed Breakdown of the 11:30AM 6818 low is also actionable.” We got exactly this Wednesday - ES went elevator down from 6865 resistance down to 6817.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into a series of quality Failed Breakdowns we had Thursday and Friday last week.

post_title: FOMC Tomorrow. Is Volatility Coming For SPX? December 10th Plan
